pages.text: Milo the fox woke up in the Meadowlands. The grass was soft, and the morning smelled like honey.
Pip the puppy trotted over. "Let's explore the Stardust Woods today!" Milo grinned and nodded yes.
Something was wrong. The moonbeam bell that lit their favorite path had gone completely silent.
They followed a trail of glowing pebbles deeper into the woods. Fireflies danced ahead like tiny lanterns.
A river blocked the way. Pip found stepping-stones shaped like stars — one, two, three hops!
Behind the waterfall they found the bell, tangled in silver vines. Together they untangled it.
The bell rang once — bright and warm. They walked home under a sky full of friendly stars.
